questions.question_text_full: Let t = 2/5, then the value of the expression t^3 + (3/5)^3 + 9/5 t is:
questions.notes: The options are labeled a, b, c, d in the image, mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.

questions.question_text_full: M and N walk along a circular track. They start at 5:00 a.m. from the same point in the opposite directions. M and N walk at a speed of 5 rounds per hour and 2 rounds per hour, respectively. How many times will they cross each other before 6.30 a.m. on the same day?
questions.notes: The options are labeled a, b, c, d in the image, mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.

warnings: Question 70 is incomplete on the page (missing options), therefore it was excluded.
